name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy plugin for Claude Code — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, in-app bug reports. One install, one MCP registration. All CRUD runs through the shipeasy MCP server or CLI; multi-step workflows ship as dedicated skills.

plugins.name: shipeasy
plugins.description: End-to-end Shipeasy plugin: base SDK install + auth + bind, plus experiments, metrics, gates, configs, kill switches, alert rules, translations, and feedback. Ships 17 skills — 9 area guides (shipeasy-flags, shipeasy-experiments, shipeasy-metrics, shipeasy-alerts, shipeasy-ops, shipeasy-i18n, shipeasy-see, shipeasy-setup, shipeasy-common) and 8 multi-step workflow skills (the three installs, the i18n codemods, the shipeasy-ops-work loop and its shipeasy-ops-trigger scheduler). All day-to-day CRUD (create/list/update/archive) runs through the registered shipeasy MCP server or the shipeasy CLI. Deletions are UI-only. Registers the shipeasy MCP server.
